strike_convention_verified: side=P: strike=atm-offset (offset<0=ITM strike-above-spot, >0=OTM); side=C: strike=atm+offset (offset<0=ITM, >0=OTM). Verified in simulator_real.py lines 357-364 BEFORE the sweep (anti-pattern 2.2).

DISCLOSURE.per_trade: avg_pnl IS the per-trade expectancy (OP-14) — reported on every cut, not WR alone.
DISCLOSURE.is_oos: IS=2025 (~12mo), OOS=2026 (~4.5mo to 05-15). Sign-stability is the gate, not raw total.
DISCLOSURE.concentration: top5_day_pct = top-5 WINNING days as % of total P&L (OP-20 #5).
DISCLOSURE.spy_vs_option: Signal scan WR != option edge (C3/L58). This is the option-edge sweep.
DISCLOSURE.no_survivor: Cells failing n/quarters/top5/OOS-sign are kept with clears_bar=false + fail_reasons (anti-pattern 2.10).
DISCLOSURE.direction_note: CALLS on H&S-top bars is a counterfactual to expose the bull-tilt; H&S-top is structurally a PUT setup.
